# mailComposeDelegate

**Instance Property**

The mail composition view controller’s delegate.

## Declaration

```swift
weak var mailComposeDelegate: MFMailComposeViewControllerDelegate? { get set }
```

```swift
weak var mailComposeDelegate: (any MFMailComposeViewControllerDelegate)? { get set }
```

## Discussion

The delegate object is responsible for dismissing the view presented by this view controller at the appropriate time. Therefore, you should always provide a delegate, and that object should implement the methods of the [doc://com.apple.messageui/documentation/MessageUI/MFMailComposeViewControllerDelegate] protocol.

## Responding to the view controller dismissal

- **MFMailComposeViewControllerDelegate**: An interface for responding to user interactions with a mail compose view controller.
